standard: JTG B01-2014 Technical Standard of Highway Engineering
issuer: Ministry of Transport / China Communications Press
notes: Free official full text obtained from the Ministry of Transport (mot.gov.cn) information-disclosure site. The official notice page https://xxgk.mot.gov.cn/2020/jigou/glj/202006/t20200623_3312197.html links a PDF attachment (公路工程技术标准.pdf) which is the complete scanned standard (115 pages, JBIG2 scanned images, image-based so no extractable text). Visual inspection confirms full standard body: road classes, design speeds (120/100/80/60 km/h), cross-section/median/lane width tables (e.g. 表4.6.2). A diagonal watermark overlays the official content. The commercial China Communications Press edition is the paid version; this MoT-hosted scan is free and official.
